subcodes.first_line: O thou who art patient! Know thou that patience is praiseworthy in all save in My love, the Mighty, the Inaccessible [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صابر ان الصبر محبوب الا فی حبی العزیز المنیع و الصمت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment
